objective: Expose the existing REPL bridge active state through the bootstrap state boundary used by SendMessageTool and ToolSearchTool.
changes: Added replBridgeActive to the bootstrap State shape and initialized it to false.
Exported isReplBridgeActive() from src/bootstrap/state.ts so existing tool imports resolve without changing call sites.
Added setReplBridgeActive() as the paired typed lifecycle updater for the same state boundary.

verification.notes: The SendMessageTool and ToolSearchTool TS2305 diagnostics for isReplBridgeActive no longer appear in the tsc log.

next_candidates: Add BetaTool compatibility to the Anthropic SDK beta messages boundary.
Add targeted internal-only module declarations for protectedNamespace, attributionTrailer, TerminalCaptureTool prompt, VerifyPlanExecutionTool constants, peerSessions, and workerAgent.
